subject: Your Cloud roundup is here, Денис
body:
Master the DVA-C02 exam — plus this week's deep dive on AWS WAF security.

Your Cloud roundup is here

*Note: You are receiving this platform-related update because you have an active Educative account. If you wish to unsubscribe from product or other updates related to your account, you can do so anytime.

Hi Денис, we made some major updates to one of our most popular courses.

FEATURED COURSE

Master AWS Certified Developer – Associate (DVA-C02) Exam

Start Learning → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VVWd6R2L_Qz1W90ymNZ9kWgzNW7Y8zfc5NDfKpN6J4pXn5m_5PW50kH_H6lZ3q6N8V-XW-LWNvcW3-YpHH1T8crRW3zJNmf5XLKY9W1tHl3g3zVpKqW1cRmTh3Rj15mW7h0G8w5MBt97W2q43C41JV78bN8vhtR8pCRtpVr1H6w3vVBfPW4lGgcd1ngqssW5QZgC74sPShrW3sg9MD3td9WzW8MK4k88jySjpW2yqWL67YrZ_QW1YSWN58_KGcdW1Kkbwz7RmRxnW6YgZrj2gNNV2W14hl0n799dnwW7K3QWl8mgNRWW156Dyd2lC-clW1kp4nD47hCSKVCbMmL9bfls0W4VGt7L17r15wW3W318w5yHl6TW3BBnvf1md4S-W8V744H1Y6gjLW2Xz3Jf1_hZTTN5cmsLbb72x5VPrWhJ1X8nvVW8hFNTg60w_YlW7jtHZW9hjlCNVF1Lf-2KtlNqf6SfHYx04 )

Updated lessons cover the full DVA-C02 exam blueprint: building cloud-native applications, securing AWS workloads, deploying with confidence, and troubleshooting at production scale.

Also included in your Educative membership is access to The Educative Newsletter. Here's this week's topic:

THIS WEEK'S NEWSLETTER

Protect Your Applications Using AWS WAF

Read Newsletter → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VVWd6R2L_Qz1W90ymNZ9kWgzNW7Y8zfc5NDfKpN6J4pXn7lxC-W50l5tj6lZ3m-W2JpchR84SXPnV82_4x7fbcycW3Cd21c3Zd3FtW1wNT9b99Ndv6W3BRSvL3Kf7RwN44xW7pTM4-HVMTQXL6l2t70W7bfzqj75BgQBW1jqGhT8FrPK-W5dSQtX6_MTbVW3BLJTP6r4bQgW1MQTk72SdzTHVCRh8c2Tz__wW5NfNP13l0nv5W2NdM5L6057BpW6KL2SR97Y1LCW3GgcDb8zC3g0W26sjzF92bTrHN8WLcKFqFsrQN37Rf2cW2rg6N2XZ1g8G-wQQW7gXwr491v0v4W8s56dP5K4hcgW6Z6vXv2QVFZgVQKnR24TQtwcW4VrcFp2HWKvrW2WLvd445_dMWN6nx11TxWm6WW29x66N4WkN1WW77TVQJ7cW2v4W43SGL168x18QW1f5q7G8bgP_3W9bTj6f269GTgVY5qlB7Qt4LvVqxrRd5zWBkWW8MWz4p7Q9FbRW7f0F-k6p9YJTW99_mBd6785PlW3VpH7683FLrhW3bkn346L_wnhW5XNtlp43t2cLW1W21VM12D6G3W3mYWb865f_3lN5tPJngMhl8bW8xL99g406Y0bW2VQHDZ1tYkgyN4YPjf-mnbNmW1Ty-9879h9BMf6FT7j-04 )

In cloud-native architectures where the traditional network perimeter no longer holds, AWS WAF protects web applications at the edge — filtering SQL injection, XSS, bot abuse, HTTP floods, and other Layer 7 threats before they reach your services.

Learn on the Go

App Store (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VVWd6R2L_Qz1W90ymNZ9kWgzNW7Y8zfc5NDfKpN6J4pZs3prCCW95jsWP6lZ3nxW3_vq-H20GLyqN1HwDjhdvcq7W3-XDvJ67fp-gW5KHM_n1RjXS4W80ttW486Q462W4Hv4Y91MT99rW5PqJ3C7Z2FTZVcXq331HwsBDW1WqjFT7Yx_ZsW1-MpJL4lWGc9W222z5c4QmW3ZW7wrklx7Q1Wl9W3N7BC41NLCbdVD_G7D8nx2kTN40z2B3lpHWmVZD7Rf8Jp3jYW2YdH8L6gP8xBW4vGwm766SRQ5W6Xp5wl4DjplPW3WmCB46vNDmyW5bT6Fx6F-6xNW17nSJW2yyyHKN5Q5t98wV2SyN6pGGYszMyQ5W57DZS52ht-KmW6528pg7TQQCnW6P6bsN2Fpc5qW7b9Tcx59cWjJW6bTK2y4_wcvVW7pbsn26jwn5sf56yTs004 ) Google Play (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VVWd6R2L_Qz1W90ymNZ9kWgzNW7Y8zfc5NDfKpN6J4pXn5m_5PW50kH_H6lZ3mrW3Nvq_X7ZZ_w3W3XlHf149Nf_jW4bmXhC8yRfFJVzwJlP6cTK9-VcH_215SKqQ_N56G6sSBBtwKVCKVDS4L8268W9g73347g2qc7W1DPCqP8WzGBsW6rVSDl2ckgH0W8M7Sdr5-PRCkW8NdtMs2Hlj3JW4vvNqX8-93ZmW5CYd028Dq3fhW8dbWwW44d3RBW3LkQBr8qp8GdVfFkQm1bV1JTW5t2f027kjV34N6qMwtfZDdf-W8Zwd-W6DMYRGW2TnjDp1rrS6MW3ZNcRH1zCS3vW8408xV4QXp8WW7DvbGy1SXYkBW43xFJ16-vyl-Tkt1m3Cb0ydW2GM7mS95dY53W6dT6QW4bnqSQVYDk-98gNF0BVJP8jV7W1Wc2W8H8sLV8Py0bkW5MS-NH8VsRhgf1tc7nn04 )
